name: FLEX LTD.
business: Flex is an advanced, end-to-end manufacturing partner that helps customers design, build, deliver, and manage products. The company provides design and engineering, supply chain, manufacturing, integrated services, and a portfolio of power and cooling products. Flex serves customers across data center, healthcare, industrial, automotive, communications, and lifestyle industries.

exposures.sentence: Our CPI segment is focused on delivering integrated compute systems, power, and cooling technologies that support large-scale cloud, data center, and AI-enabled infrastructure deployments.
Our CPI segment is focused on delivering integrated compute systems, power, and cooling technologies that support large-scale cloud, data center, and AI-enabled infrastructure deployments.

Automotive, compute and power electronics platforms, and integrated systems

Power, utility and facility level electrical infrastructure enabling reliable, scalable power delivery and high-density rack- and board-level power systems

catalysts.event: Spin-off of Cloud and Power Infrastructure (CPI) segment into independent publicly traded company
catalysts.sentence: The separation of CPI from Flex into SpinCo will create a separate publicly traded company... The spin-off of CPI from Flex is expected to be completed in the first quarter of calendar 2027
We continued with the acquisition of a power facility in Poland in fiscal year 2026 and the acquisition of Electrical Power Products in May 2026.
